# North Star

Every small business deserves a great assistant.

Business OS exists to remove worry from daily operations. We do not measure
success by features shipped. We measure success by problems made easier,
mistakes prevented, and worries removed.

## Product Standard

Every Assistant must help a real business owner do one of these:

- Save time.
- Reduce mistakes.
- Reduce stress.
- Increase confidence.
- Improve business visibility.

If a release does not improve at least one of these outcomes, it should not
ship.

## Measurement

Business OS should be evaluated by customer clarity, operational reliability,
and trust.

The best feature is not the most complex feature. The best feature is the one a
small business owner understands immediately and uses tomorrow.
